posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I have a portfolio board, with all project, and for each project sub items as work breakdown structure.
When receving an update, I do not see which project it relies to. Only sub-item.
Need to see parent items in inbox updates breadcrumb

Regards
Laurent
